docs.title: Overview
docs.text: Git related articles are managed in this folder.

docs.title: Remove tracked files from version control
docs.text:
git rm --cached [file or folder]

Then add [file or foler] in .gitignore or in [repo root]\.git\modules\[module repo]\info\exclude.

echo "[file or foler]" >> .gitignore
echo "[file or foler]" >> ..\.git\modules\[module repo]\info\exclude

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
The GitHub section collects all articles about GitHub knowledge pieces. In most cases, you can get helpful information from the GitHub official site docs. However, sometimes, the articles here can save some time for you.

If you are working on GitHub Pages, then you can check the content in pages.

docs.title: Domain Management
docs.text:
Go to Google Domain and open the target domain. Then click DNS, in Resource Records, create a new record and fill the below fields:

  • Host name: www
  • Type: CNAME
  • TTL: 3600
  • Data: wenijinew.github.io. if the site is to host on github. ubiquitous-boba-dbb112.netlify.app. if the site is to host on netlify. Note: For netlify, you need to check in the Domain Management of your site. Check Manage domains for your production site for more information.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
Mkdocs related articles are managed in this folder.

To pubish mkdocs site to GitHub Pages, check Deploy Your Docs
